name: Maps and Data - U.S. Public Electric Vehicle Charging Infrastructure

name: Electric vehicle charging – Global EV Outlook 2025 – Analysis - IEA

name: Latest EV Charging Report Highlights Industry Growth in 2025

name: Electric Vehicle Charging Data and Communications Protocol

name: U.S. charging infrastructure deployment through 2024
snippet: From 2019 to 2024, the deployment rate of this non-home charging infrastructure for light-duty electric vehicles (EVs) grew about 25% annually.
